name: Hanako - The Loving Defender Forever
desc:
1 "TTF Atermis" monster + "TTF Hanako" + 1+ Effect Monsters
Must be Fusion Summoned.
Unaffected by other cards’ effects, except "TTF Atermis" cards. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card, then target 1 other face-up monster you control; that monster becomes unaffected by card effects until the end of this turn, but this card cannot declare an attack for the rest of this turn. If this card leaves the field: You can Special Summon 1 "Atermis" monster from your hand or GY.
